name: QA 1464
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1464

pmlogrewrite - indom <spec> { iname replace /re/ -> "replacement" }



valgrind variant, see qa/1462 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: pmlogrewrite pmdumplog
